extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims their package was crushed in transit, specifically referring to packaging damage.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows a package with significant crushing and deformation on multiple sides and corners of the box.

result.user_claim: Customer: My package was crushed in transit. | Support: Are you claiming item damage too? | Customer: No, packaging damage. | Support: Please describe the package issue only. | Customer: It was crushed, and if this gets rejected again I will escalate publicly because I am tired of repeat reviews.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed box with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed box with visible crushed_packaging. Supporting images: img_1.
